title: Seafah
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Seafah.jpg|thumb]]
The '''seafah''' was a shellfish native to [[Pydyr]]. Its shell was quite beautiful, and harvested by the [[Pydyrian]]s to make jewelry and frescoes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-07-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''
